reviews.review_description: I have been waiting and waiting and waiting. I need this game in a full version with more tanks and more things to do it's so good!
Love this game but really wish they would add to it now and release the full game i can spend hours on this game and can't wait to buy the full version

reviews.review_title: Ready for paid updates and MR mode
reviews.review_description: Game is awesome, Seems to be stalled in early access mode though. Devs seem to be focusing on realfishing vr. Incredible game, would love to get a full version (paid) with more features, tanks and the MR passthrough mode.
The screen is black, I can not do anything Just empty tank
Very relaxing and enjoyable  :-) Hope they add Saltwater
I used to own many aquariums.  This is a lot easier.  Great start!

When I downloaded this app I thought it placed you within an aquarium (clearly, I didn't view all the promo pics lol) rather than in a workshop setting where you are designing very realistic looking aquariums. I wasn't sure how enjoyable that could really be in VR. 

Turns out the answer is extremely enjoyable. Delightful and relaxing. Simple controls, endless ways to customize. I had been planning to pop in, get an overview and come back to it later, but I ended up spending almost the entirety of my VR session putting together pretty little aquariums, excited for the fish and decorations I would be unlocking. I hope there will be more fish and decor (particularly colorful stuff) added over time. Given the excellent developers, I feel confident that will be the case. 

A pleasant little surprise was how realistic the fish look in the tank, and how closely the fish mirror the behavior of their real world counterparts. It was really cool to see tetra darting around the way they do in real life.

I’m not much of a gamer or even a VR gamer. So I can quite comfortably say this is the greatest game I’ve ever played haha. 
I wanted something relaxing and to do with fish and aquariums. This is exactly what I’ve been after for such a long time. 
Hopefully it will just keep getting better and better with every update. 
Thank you!!!
Edit - I’ve found one little problem. No matter what I do for some reason the heater doesn’t work and I can not find out why. What am I doing wrong? Is it me or the game? 😂
Very nice game. For the future, more aquariums in different sizes and more decorative elements.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for enjoying Aquascape, Spyda-alc-.
We are happy to hear that you are enjoying Aquascape very much.
If we plan the update for this project, we'll let you know as soon  as possible:)
Please let us know if you have any feedback for aquascape :)

reviews.review_description: Love this game so far! This is the early access version so I can imagine there will be saltwater as well as freshwater aquariums and even many more types of fish and decor in the full/regular version when it's released in future. However, this version is very fun and relaxing, I’ve been playing pretty much daily and will definitely buy the full edition when it comes out. (As a bonus, the developers are from the Real VR Fishing game so I’m very familiar with them from the RVRF group and how responsive/kind they always are.)

reviews.review_description: This game obviously has a ton of stuff they could add but for the build version 0.4.3, it’s very polished and relaxing!

I love this game!  It is so beautiful, so relaxing, and so addicting!  I have always had aquariums in the past, but when I sold my house I also sold my aquariums because they were too hard to move, and I don't have the room where I live now.  I really enjoy watching the fish move around.  In the future, will we be able to have our own aquariums that we don't sell, so we can watch our fish grow?  Thank you for an awesome game.

Thank you for enjoying Aquascape, BadGamerKat.
We are happy to hear that you are enjoying Aquascape very much.
If we plan the update for this project, we'll let you know as soon  as possible:)
Please let us know if you have any feedback for aquascape :)

reviews.review_description: As usual, Devs United Games never disappoints. Love real vr fishing and this too. What a talented team, keep up the good work 👍🏻 Will be nice if there are windows too and if we can exit the door.

Remindes me of a game back in the day called "Fish Tycoon" where you bred, raised, and sold fish all while decorating your aquarium and finding the 7 magic fish species by mixing fish species to breed.

EDIT: 
The Hand Tracking could definitely use some work; their is a bug that happens often when one hand loses ability to interact with certain things or at times with anything. It can happen to either hand at seemingly any time. No rush though.👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your great review and feedback, DeRezzedA.I.
We are happy to hear that our game remind you your memory. We'll check your feedback and improve Aquascape as much as we can :)

Please enjoy it and let us know if you have any feedback on our game!

reviews.review_description: Well I tried the game I had no issues well put together  also i think kids would love this.my neice is a marine biologist  she said it was awesome and said it should be shown in the school system in the science class students would love to explore this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review of Aquascape - Early Access and for sharing your niece's feedback as well. We're so glad to hear that you both enjoyed the game and found it to be educational.

We agree that Aquascape can be a great learning tool for students of all ages. The game provides an immersive way to learn about different types of aquatic plants and fish, as well as the principles of aquascape design. We're excited to hear that your niece is a marine biologist, and we hope that Aquascape can help her to continue learning about and exploring the underwater world.

We're still working on adding new features and content to Aquascape - Early Access, but we're committed to making it the best aquascaping game possible. We appreciate your feedback and support.

reviews.review_description:
As someone who does this as a hobby irl I can say with confidence that this game is fantastic already. Early access and I haven't encountered any thing game breaking (I'm currently almost lvl 6).
I eagerly look forward to watching this evolve into its final form. 
Stellar work from the Devs once again!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words about Aquascape-Early Access! We are so happy to hear that you are enjoying the game so far. We are working hard to make the game even better, and your feedback is invaluable to us.

We are particularly glad to hear that you have not encountered any game-breaking bugs, even though the game is still in early access. This is a testament to the hard work and dedication of our development team.

We are also excited to hear that you are looking forward to the final version of the game. 
Thank you again for your feedback and support. We appreciate you!

reviews.review_description: Very good

Great game I personally have a fish tank and this game was great to do because in my fish tank. I can’t spend a lot of money so this was a great game just to be creative and live out my dreams of owning a great fish tank with mini fish 10 out of five if I had to.

I really like Aqua Scapes, but it still needs some work. Trying to grab an item to place in the tank was very hard at first, but it's gotten better with practice. It's still very hard trying to place the water tube in the tank & then removing it without selecting something else instead. I want it out of the way when I take a photo or video of a new build. Despite the growing pains while under development, I see the potential for this being a great app once finished.

reviews.review_title: What you expect from DUG, perfection!
reviews.review_description: This games is perfect for calming down and relaxing. The vast amount of customization with your aquascapes is amazing. The fish are exactly what you expect from the developers of a great fishing game. I can’t wait to see how this game turns out!
